'''Keedad''' was a remote terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CRO" /> located in the [[Keedad system/Legends|Keedad system]], a part of the [[Auril sector/Legends|Auril sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="Slice" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to the [[lettrani fruit tree]] as well as the [[near-Human]] [[Keed]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="CRO" />

During the early history of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]],<ref name="CRO" /> which was [[Galactic Constitution Conference|established]] in [[25,053 BBY]],<ref name="SWTOR">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''</ref> [[Human/Legends|Humans]] [[Colonist/Legends|settled]] Keedad. [[Ytavarg Aleema]] was a Keed of Keedad who was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]]<ref name="CRO" /> around [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]]<ref name="26 BBY">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', which is set shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], gives [[Ytavarg Aleema]]'s age as 26 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old, which corresponds to a [[Reproduction/Legends|birth]] date of around [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> and was additionally descended from the Human colonists. At one point by the [[Time/Legends|time]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Aleema participated in a pick-up game of [[lettranin]]—with the sport being played in an enclosed [[Stone/Legends|stone]] arena—the spectators of which included the vacationing [[Ger Plortor]], a scout for the prominent, [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]–based [[Shockball/Legends|shockball]] team the [[Shad Furies/Legends|Shad Furies]]. Plortor recruited the Keed [[athlete]] for the team, and Aleema accompanied the scout to the Core Worlds, eventually becoming the most renowned shockball player in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Keedad was created by [[Craig Robert Carey]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Keedad [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet, in grid square R-7.<ref name="TEA" />
